title: Spiced Nutty Tunisian Tagine
description: A hearty, comforting Tunisian dish made with toasted almonds, aromatic spices, and tender chicken.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together cumin seeds, coriander seeds, cinnamon sticks, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken to the spice mixture and toss to coat.
Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the pot and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the kaffir lime leaf to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken broth to the pot and bring to a boil.
Transfer the pot to the preheated oven and cook, covered, for 25 minutes.
Stir in the toasted almonds and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
